title: Organize Azure Resources with Application Groups - Azure Integration Environments
description: Learn how to organize and manage Azure resources based on your integration solutions by creating application groups.
summary: Note This capability is in preview and is subject to theSupplemental Terms of Use for Microsoft Azure Previews. After you create an integration environment, create one or more application groups to organize existing Azure resources related to your integration solutions. These groups help you break down your environment even further so that you can manage your resources at more a granular level.
classification_reason: How-to create application groups to organize resources; organizational guidance without product-specific limits, config matrices, or error-resolution content.

title: Create integration environments for Azure resources - Azure Integration Environments
description: Create an integration environment to centrally organize and manage Azure resources related to your integration solutions.
summary: Note This capability is in preview and is subject to theSupplemental Terms of Use for Microsoft Azure Previews. To centrally and logically organize and manage Azure resources associated with your integration solutions, create an integration environment. For more information, seeWhat is Azure Integration Environments?
classification_reason: How-to create an integration environment; likely step-by-step portal instructions without configuration parameter tables, limits, or troubleshooting mappings.

title: Overview - Azure Integration Environments
